prompt:
A researcher claims that recycling rate in the town climbed steadily from 2020 to 2025.

Which choice best uses data from the table to support the researcher's claim?

choices.text: The value rose by more than 35 percent in a single year.
choices.rationale: The largest one-year change was only 20 percent.

choices.text: The value changed by the same amount every year, a constant 14 percent per year.
choices.rationale: The year-to-year changes vary, so the change was not a constant 14 percent.

choices.text: Almost all of the change happened between 2020 and 2021, with little movement afterward.
choices.rationale: The value changes in every year shown, not just the first span.

choices.text: Year over year the figure rose, reaching 422 percent by 2025 from 350 percent.
choices.rationale: Correct. This matches the steady, one-direction trend the claim describes across every year shown.

explanation: The supporting statement must reflect the table's actual, consistent trend across all the years shown.
